'''''Player's Guide to Tapani''''' is a book for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]], published by [[West End Games]] in [[July]] [[1997]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
*Introduction
*Chapter One: [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]
*Chapter Two: The [[Expanse]]
*Chapter Three: [[Tapani Noble Houses]]
**[[House Barnaba]]
**[[House Cadriaan]]
**[[House Calipsa]]
**[[House Mecetti]]
**[[House Melantha]]
**[[House Pelagia]]
**[[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]]
*Chapter Four: The [[Freeworlds Territory|Freeworlds]] Region
*Chapter Five: Sector Gazetteer
*Chapter Six: [[Tapani Campaign]]
*Chapter Seven: Sector Aliens
**Aliens in the [[Expanse]]
**Aliens in the Freeworlds
**[[Herglic/Legends|Herglics]]
**[[Mrlssi]]
*Chapter Eight: Character Generation
*Chapter Nine: Character Templates

**Bacta [[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]]
**Bacta [[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]]
